Title: User Registration Flow
Preconditions: User is on the MainActivity screen.
Test Data: Valid user details (email: test@example.com, password: Test@123)
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to SignUpActivity from MainActivity.
2. User fills in the registration form with valid details.
3. User submits the form.
4. System checks if the user is registered successfully.
5. System returns to the MainActivity.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and redirected to MainActivity.

Title: User Registration Failure
Preconditions: User is on the MainActivity screen.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to SignUpActivity from MainActivity.
2. User fills in the registration form with invalid details.
3. User submits the form.
4. System checks if the user is registered successfully.
5. System displays error message and remains on SignUpActivity.
Expected Result: User registration fails due to invalid input, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Navigate to Dashboard
Preconditions: User is on the MainActivity screen.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to DashboardActivity from MainActivity.
2. System displays the dashboard.
Expected Result: User is successfully navigated to the DashboardActivity.

Title: Navigate to User List
Preconditions: User is on the MainActivity screen.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to UserListActivity from MainActivity.
2. System displays the user list.
Expected Result: User is successfully navigated to the UserListActivity.

Title: Display Current Weather
Preconditions: User is on the Home activity.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "weather" button.
2. System displays the current weather for the user's location.
Expected Result: Current weather information is displayed for the user's location.

Title: Search Weather for Other Locations
Preconditions: User is viewing the current weather.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the enlargement side.
2. User searches for weather in another location (New York).
3. System displays the weather for the specified location.
Expected Result: Weather information for New York is displayed.

Title: Select Trekking Route
Preconditions: User is on the Applicazione.
Test Data: Province: Lombardia, Path: Sentiero dei Laghi
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Trekking".
2. Applicazione requests a list of provinces from the Server.
3. Server sends the list of provinces to the Applicazione.
4. User selects a province (Lombardia).
5. Applicazione requests a list of paths from the Server for the selected province.
6. Server sends the list of paths to the Applicazione.
7. User selects a path (Sentiero dei Laghi).
8. Applicazione displays the selected path details.
Expected Result: User is shown the details of the selected trekking path.

Title: Retrieve Weather Data
Preconditions: User is on the Applicazione.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Weather".
2. Applicazione requests weather data from the Server.
3. Server sends the weather data to the Applicazione.
4. Applicazione displays the weather data to the user.
Expected Result: Weather data is successfully retrieved and displayed to the user.

Title: Retrieve Health Data
Preconditions: User is on the Application.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Health".
2. Application requests past training data from the Server.
3. Server sends the training data to the Application.
4. Application provides the list of training data to the user.
Expected Result: Past training data is successfully retrieved and displayed to the user.

Title: No Health Data Available
Preconditions: User is on the Application.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Health".
2. Application requests past training data from the Server.
3. Server indicates no data available.
4. Application informs the user that no training data is available.
Expected Result: User is informed that there is no past training data available.

Title: Health Data Retrieval Failure
Preconditions: User is on the Application.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Health".
2. Application requests past training data from the Server.
3. Server fails to send the data.
4. Application displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the health data could not be retrieved.

Title: Weather Display Failure
Preconditions: User is on the Home activity.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "weather" button.
2. System fails to display the current weather for the user's location.
3. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the weather data could not be retrieved.

Title: Province Selection Failure
Preconditions: User is on the Applicazione.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Trekking".
2. Applicazione requests a list of provinces from the Server.
3. Server fails to send the list of provinces.
4. Applicazione displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the province list could not be retrieved.

Title: Path Selection Failure
Preconditions: User has selected a province.
Test Steps:
1. User selects a province.
2. Applicazione requests a list of paths from the Server for the selected province.
3. Server fails to send the list of paths.
4. Applicazione displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the path list could not be retrieved.

Title: Duplicate User Registration
Preconditions: User is on the MainActivity screen.
Test Data: Existing user details (email: existing@example.com, password: Existing@123)
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to SignUpActivity from MainActivity.
2. User fills in the registration form with existing user details.
3. User submits the form.
4. System checks if the user is registered successfully.
5. System displays an error message and remains on SignUpActivity.
Expected Result: User registration fails due to duplicate email, and an error message is displayed.
